## Run with Docker (one command)

Replace `v0.0.0` with this release's tag:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://github.com/kaynor/agent-voir/releases/download/v0.0.0/run-agentvoir.sh | bash
```

Full install guide: [deployments/docker/INSTALL.md](https://github.com/kaynor/agent-voir/blob/main/deployments/docker/INSTALL.md)
